reason: This is a general religious/philosophical quote about sin and worship, with no connection to ISIS or extremism. It translates to 'One of the predecessors said that the body does not find pleasure in food with illness, so how can a servant find pleasure in worship with sins?'
original_post: قال أحد السلف إن الجسد لا يجد لذة الطعام مع المـرض ، فكيف يجد العبد لذة العبادة مع الذنوب ؟! .
